key.name: terminal
key.description: Custom terminal command used only when the terminal profile is set to Custom. The command is appended after it.

key.name: terminal-profile
key.description: Selected terminal preset. Empty value preserves backward compatibility.

key.name: show-all-containers
key.description: When enabled, stopped containers are shown alongside running containers.

key.name: group-by-compose-project
key.description: When enabled, containers are grouped by the com.docker.compose.project label when available.
